comparison_defaults.all_approaches_target_policy: When comparing static, symbolic, fuzzing, and hybrid together, default to Not-so-smart plus smartbugs-curated only.

notes: Only FSE 2024 benchmark suites should be used for default benchmarking unless a task explicitly opts into supplemental scenario or stress corpora.
Supplemental suites remain under Benchmarks/ for research, exploit scenarios, and specialized evaluation, but are not part of the active default benchmark scope.
